title: torminalis clusii
intro: Torminalis clusii, also known as the Bitter Balsam or Bitter Balm, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Torminalis clusii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Torminalis clusii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various forms of consumption in traditional medicine.
